description: This Java source file defines a Spring Boot REST controller class 'AuthController' that manages authentication-related endpoints such as registration, login, email verification, and resend verification. It interacts with an authentication service and handles HTTP requests/responses with JSON payloads.

classes.name: AuthController
classes.description: Handles authentication-related HTTP endpoints such as registration, login, email verification, and resending verification links.

methods.name: register
methods.description: Handles user registration by creating a new user and sending an email verification.

methods.name: login
methods.description: Handles user login, verifying credentials and email verification status.

methods.name: resendVerification
methods.description: Resends the email verification link to unverified users.

methods.name: verify
methods.description: Verifies a user account using a verification token.

methods.name: extractIp
methods.description: Extracts client IP address from the HttpServletRequest, considering proxy headers.
